name: Car-Market
description: Production marketplace to buy and sell used cars in India — listings from individuals and verified dealers.
longDescription: Car-Market (auto.linkpc.net) is a live used-car marketplace built for the Indian market. It connects buyers and sellers through searchable listings, dealer verification, city-based browsing, and companion mobile apps — engineered as a multi-surface product from API to web and native clients.
highlights: Listings from individuals and verified dealers
City-based search across major Indian markets
Web app plus Android and iOS companion apps

caseStudy.challenge: Build a trustworthy used-car marketplace for India that scales across web and mobile while keeping listings searchable, dealer verification clear, and the experience fast for everyday buyers and sellers.
caseStudy.solution: Shipped a FastAPI backend with PostgreSQL and Redis, a Next.js web front end, and native Android (Kotlin) and iOS (Swift) apps — with Docker-based infrastructure and documentation for production deployment.
caseStudy.outcome: A production platform live at auto.linkpc.net where users can browse, compare, and list used cars across Indian cities.

architecture.summary: Multi-surface marketplace architecture with a shared API core and dedicated web and mobile clients.

layers.name: Web
layers.role: Browse listings, search, sell flows, SEO-friendly pages

layers.name: API
layers.role: Listings, auth, dealer verification, business rules

layers.name: Data
layers.role: Persistent storage and caching for search performance

layers.name: Mobile
layers.role: Native Android and iOS apps for on-the-go browsing
